introSection: Tajfun (Russian: Тайфун - English: Typhoon) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Revolution Park in Rostov-on-Don, Rostov, Russia.
fullText:
Tajfun (Russian: Тайфун - English: Typhoon) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Revolution Park in Rostov-on-Don, Rostov, Russia.



Black track and white supports.
